serialization.policy: Preserve binary64 round-trip precision; solver-specific inputs are derived adapters, not a second authority.

source_exit_surface.policy: Export every qualifying source-exit event; never clip it with a downstream reference distribution.

target_entry_surface.reference_derivation: outer_face_x = accelerator_axis_x - (accelerator_bore_half + accelerator_ring_width + accelerator_insulation_gap + accelerator_shield_wall); y and z use the formal source center
required_before_runtime: parameterized side-port cut through the accelerator shield
physical entry aperture and grounded injection-tube geometry

pulse_capture_state.derivation: Replay the time-stamped entry stream through the connector and collection region to the pulse trigger time.

derived_target_from_source_pose.policy: Derive from the two component poses; never maintain an independently editable duplicate transform.

rigid_transform_rules.time: instrument_time_us is unchanged by a coordinate transform
rigid_transform_rules.physical_policy: A transform registers coordinate frames only; it may not teleport particles across the physical connector gap.

alignment_variables.acceptance_policy: Evaluate alignment errors through the frozen connector and downstream capture model; do not compensate by moving the source distribution in post-processing.

spatial_responsibilities: realize the physical separation and relative angle between source exit and target entry
provide mechanical alignment or physical steering and focusing elements when required
transport particles through the full displaced geometry without coordinate teleportation

target_entry_topology_audit.comsol: accelshield is one outer Block minus one inner Block, leaving continuous x/y side walls and an integrated rear cap; no side-port subtraction exists
target_entry_topology_audit.simion: the grounded accelerator electrode is an outer centered box minus an inner centered box plus a rear closure; no lateral port is removed
target_entry_topology_audit.cad: the COMSOL accelshield Difference is exported as one accelerator_shield solid, so CAD inherits the closed side wall
target_entry_topology_audit.conclusion: The present formal analyzer has no physical +x injection opening. A connector alone outside the shield cannot deliver particles into the release region.

required_physics: static or time-dependent magnetic field when present
connector.field_ownership_policy: If upstream and downstream fields overlap, the overlap belongs to one connector or joint model; a one-way particle handoff may not split the overlap.

time_control.static_field_policy: A local rebase is allowed only when forces are time independent and the canonical time mapping is retained.
time_control.time_dependent_field_policy: Release each particle at its mapped local time and evaluate every waveform on the same mapped instrument clock.

required_fields: electrode states before and after trigger

target_reference_distribution.policy: The current 1 x 1 x 1 mm formal release distribution is a validation input, not a proven target-entry aperture or pulse-capture acceptance.

storage_policy.canonical: one compact source-exit event row per particle plus one metadata JSON
storage_policy.derived_runtime_inputs: Generate only for the selected downstream solver and run; they do not become parameter authorities.
storage_policy.three_dimensional_snapshot: Generate only when a pulse-capture, space-charge or diagnostic consumer requires it.
storage_policy.dense_trajectories: Diagnostic only; never part of the canonical handoff.
